description: A quality manager needs to pull training records for all operators on a specific production line to prepare for an external audit.

nodes.task_description: Identify all employees assigned to the specified production line.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of all operators for that line.

nodes.task_description: For each employee, retrieve their training records from the learning management system (LMS).

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the training history for each person on the list.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report showing the status of all required training for the audit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a report that can be presented to the auditor, highlighting any gaps.
